details.service_description: Complete SBR systems including tanks, pumps, blowers, aerators, decanters, skimmers and piping. Systems available in FRP (Fiber Reinforced Plastic) tanks. Example installation includes two 8 ft (2.3 M) diameter, 14 ft (4.3 M) high FRP tanks. Suitable for refinery and chemical applications. Complete turnkey systems supplied by Mixing Systems, Inc..
